name: TN Brain · 9 · Weekly report sync (SharePoint → weekly_reports)

parameters.query: INSERT INTO projects (monday_item_id, name, account_id, account_name, phase, rag, delivery_manager_name, last_verified) SELECT 'wr:'||w.project_title, NULLIF(trim(regexp_replace(w.project_title, '(Weekly )?(Delivery )?Summary\s*$', '', 'i')), ''), w.account_id, w.account_name, w.phase, w.rag, w.customer_lead, now() FROM weekly_reports w WHERE w.week_ending = (SELECT max(week_ending) FROM weekly_reports) AND w.account_id IS NOT NULL ON CONFLICT (monday_item_id) DO UPDATE SET account_id=COALESCE(EXCLUDED.account_id, projects.account_id), phase=EXCLUDED.phase, rag=EXCLUDED.rag, delivery_manager_name=EXCLUDED.delivery_manager_name, last_verified=now();

UPDATE calls c SET project_id = p.id FROM projects p WHERE c.project_id IS NULL AND c.account_id = p.account_id AND (SELECT count(*) FROM projects p2 WHERE p2.account_id = c.account_id) = 1; UPDATE signals s SET project_id = p.id FROM projects p WHERE s.project_id IS NULL AND s.account_id = p.account_id AND (SELECT count(*) FROM projects p2 WHERE p2.account_id = s.account_id) = 1;

nodes.name: Link account-level calls to the project

parameters.query: =INSERT INTO run_logs (workflow,status,detail) VALUES ('weekly_report_sync','ok', jsonb_build_object('files', {{ $('Each report file').all().length }}));

parameters.content:
## Weekly report sync
Mondays 08:00 (their Power Automate generator runs 07:05): list the 'Generated Report' library → download every WeeklyStatus_*.html → split into per-project sections → upsert into `weekly_reports` (idempotent on week+project, so re-runs and backfills are free — the FIRST manual run ingests all past weeks).

Account matching: section title vs accounts → projects fallback (GVMS/EMCS → HMRC via SOW names); raw client_directory match stored in account_name. Unmatched rows keep account_id NULL — check with:
SELECT project_title, account_id, account_name FROM weekly_reports WHERE week_ending=(SELECT max(week_ending) FROM weekly_reports);

Run db/2026-07_weekly_reports.sql BEFORE first run.

main.node: Link account-level calls to the project
